basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Sr. Project Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is 5% relaxation of marks.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech in Structural Engineering with minimum three years research experience OR PhD in Civil Engg, specializing in cement chemistry, carbonation of cementitious systems, and electrochemical corrosion of steel in concrete.
qualification.details: Sr. Project Scientist: 1st class M. Tech in Structural Engineering with minimum three years research experience in construction materials OR PhD in Civil Engg, specialising in cement chemistry, carbonation of cementitious systems, and electrochemical corrosion of steel in concrete. Preference will be given to candidates with experience in sensors or the development of sensor-based equipment.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist recruitment is 16 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a 1st class M. Tech in Structural Engineering with a minimum of three years of research experience in construction materials, or a PhD in Civil Engineering specializing in cement chemistry, carbonation of cementitious systems, and electrochemical corrosion of steel in concrete.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist position ranges from Rs. 60,750 to Rs. 79,260 per month, plus HRA at 27%. The pay slab details are also provided.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by downloading the application form from the IRD website, filling it completely, and sending it via email to Prof. Deepak Kumar Kamde at [email protected], mentioning the advertisement number in the subject line.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Sr. Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Sr. Project Scientist role will be based on an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While specific age limits are not detailed, the notification mentions a 5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Sr. Project Scientist post at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is project-based, focusing on research and development.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the IRD website of IIT Delhi at http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.
